steps.title: Fastest path: graph or solve the equation
steps.content:
Type the equation into Desmos as written:
$$f(x)=x^{2}-12x+30$$Graph it and use the visible intercept, root, or vertex the question asks for. The requested value is $-6$.

steps.title: Minimum value = c - b²/(4a) — no need to find x first
Result
steps.content: The minimum value of $f$ is $-6$. That confirms B is correct.
